artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
removed_or_excluded_refs: Decision table exists with per-train recommended action, cost temporary stand-in formulas, post-action metric references, and labels (pass / needs_review). Justifications tie back to diagnosis and simulated results (T2 marked needs_review because no in-budget package fully meets salt limit). Budget reconciliation cell references are present.

Manually open [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] and verify the formulas for: simulation!M2:M4 (Flow_post), simulation!N2:N4 (Salt_post), simulation!O2:O4 (DP_post), simulation!P2:P4 and Q2:Q4 (SDI_release and SDI_future), and recommendations!D2:D4 (costs) and recommendations!D6 (budget check). Record the cell values computed and capture a short verification log (or screenshots) saved to attempts/revised/verification_log.txt.
